items.name: Crimson Flame Coat [PBR]
items.description:
🔥 Bold • Stylish • Adventurous
This vibrant red coat isn’t just clothing — it’s a statement. The rich crimson color immediately catches the eye, while the belted waist and flowing cut give it a sleek silhouette full of confidence. Subtle flame-like patterns near the hem add a sense of energy and motion, as if the coat carries its own spark.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
❤️ Crimson red fabric that stands out in any crowd
🔥 Subtle flame accents for a touch of dynamic flair
🧵 Detailed belts and seams for depth and realism
✨ PBR textures that make the coat come alive
🎮 Ideal for fantasy, stylish streetwear, or heroic avatars
🔍 Keywords: red coat, crimson fashion, long jacket, stylish outfit, flame design, Roblox PBR clothing, bold fashion, fantasy wear, heroic style
This coat is for players who want to look confident, adventurous, and unforgettable — a piece that burns bright without being too loud.
High-quality PBR textures included.

items.name: Crimson Noir Modest Coat Dress [PBR]
items.description:
🖤🌹 Dark elegance meets bold florals in this refined, modest fashion statement!
This layered coat dress combines a striking black inner outfit with a dramatic outer coat patterned in red, white, and black blossoms. The flared sleeves, ruffled edges, and soft draping create a sophisticated silhouette, while the oversized black bow on the chest adds a touch of classic femininity. With its rich contrast and couture-inspired design, this piece is perfect for gothic-themed worlds, high-fashion NPCs, elegant roleplay characters, or anyone seeking modest style with strong visual impact. PBR textures enhance the fabric depth, print clarity, and natural folds for a premium experience.
🔍 Keywords: modest, floral, gothic, coat dress, elegant, layered, bow, couture, fashion, PBR, dramatic
Let your avatar express powerful elegance with this couture-inspired modest ensemble.
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.
